title: Greek Lamb Skewers
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make recipe for lamb skewers, perfect for grilling in the summer.

ingredients.name: Lamb shoulder, cut into 1-inch cubes
ingredients.notes: Make sure to pat dry the lamb cubes before grilling

instructions: 1. Preheat your grill to medium-high heat (around 400°F/200°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together garlic, oregano, salt, and lemon juice.
3. Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and mix until they are evenly coated with the marinade.
4. Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Brush the grill grates with oil to prevent sticking.
6. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, flipping halfway through, or until the lamb reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
7. Remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for 5 minutes.
8. Serve the skewers hot with a dollop of Greek yogurt on top.
9. Garnish with fresh parsley or oregano if desired.
